subject: (no subject)
body:
remind me re jack kessler, and anf... call larry
summers, tell leon black that he is welcome to come to
harvard wed night for dinner,, andre belasz, remind me
to call seed mag re conference.. delson and calendar,
leah suvia, find her schedule.. ask peggy segal if she
is town, jenny saunders, motolla , barrack.     this
morning  please ask Jimmy  caynes sec if he is paying
for the flight or Bear STearns..margie memo,, ammerlin
memo brisely memo. dempsey..
